dimensions.notes: All 7 spec routes, all critical states, CTA locked, synthetic nonclaims present.
Verbatim port — minimum necessary, nothing speculative.
Full a11y: skip link, aria-labels, form error announcements, focus rings.
Synthetic-only scope. No real payments, auth, distribution. Scanner clean.
tsc --noEmit + build cover structural correctness. No behavioral unit tests (no jest/vitest). Acceptable for a verbatim UI port.
Synthetic nonclaims on every transaction surface. Component design invariants preserved from source.
